sentences.text: Thank you for calling management to help prevent the spread of the coronavirus gallon management staff will be working from home. Please listen as our menu has changed. For any other issues, please leave a voicemail or email receptionist at dot com. All voicemails left on our main line as well as voicemails left in the mail boxes of individual staff will be returned for a directory listing of staff, please press Pound. Thank you have a nice day. If you are calling from a rotary, using the keys on your telephone, please spell the last name of the person then press pound. For the letter Q.
